brief_justification: Arrives at exact answer (C) with correct lag-based reasoning for all five effects; traces second-order phase-shift implications and explains why 'cancel out' framing fails at the mechanism level; notes API fallback and marks boundary conditions ('6mo = lower bound') but does not explicitly name reasoning biases or assumptions; explicitly falsifies all three incorrect options from different angles as verification; precisely distinguishes 'just beginning,' 'fully materialized,' and 'not materialized' states with confidence tied to lag ranges; systematically evaluates all four options with specific rejection reasons for each; every conclusion derives from a lag table a third party could reconstruct independently; explicitly avoids the fragmented-chains anti-pattern by weaving IR and QE into a unified phase-shift narrative; exhibits none of the suppressed modes—no fragmented bullets as final conclusion, no single-chain anchoring, no effect-before-cause violations; follows chain-partition then interaction-mapping structure from topology but does not traverse the loop/gate nodes explicitly.
